title: Rewrite OpsPanel as StatusPanel with system overview
description: Full rewrite of OpsPanel.tsx into StatusPanel with 4 sections: System Vitals, Active Directives, Velocity, Session Health. Rename all ops->status references across 7 files.

in: Create StatusPanel.tsx with 4 sections: System Vitals KPI, Active Directives, Velocity, Session Health
Rename 'ops' to 'status' across all 7 files (SidePanel, GameHeader, GamePage, types, useBadgeCounts, index, panel file)
Use activeDirectives[], sessions[], directiveHistory[], connected from Zustand store

dod.criterion: OpsPanel.tsx replaced by StatusPanel.tsx
Tab label shows 'Status' not 'Ops'
System Vitals KPI strip shows connection, sessions, directives, projects
Active Directives section shows pipeline progress for each active directive
Velocity section shows recent completions and 7d throughput
Session Health shows status distribution bar
All 22 rename items updated (no leftover 'ops' references)
No references to FeatureRecord, BacklogRecord, or workState.features/backlogs
TypeScript compiles without errors

tasks.title: Rename all ops references to status across 6 support files
tasks.user_scenario: CEO clicks the HUD tab bar and sees 'Status' instead of 'Ops'. All routing, badges, and furniture click targets work correctly with the new name.
tasks.scope: Update HudTab type, HudPanel type, TileType union, TAB_LIST, TAB_ICONS, HUD_TYPES, hudTypeToTab, FURNITURE_TAB_MAP, typeMap, activePanel switch cases, BadgeCounts interface, badge variable/return key, HudButton label/onClick/active/aria, and panel import/switch in SidePanel. Files: SidePanel.tsx, GameHeader.tsx, GamePage.tsx, types.ts, useBadgeCounts.ts, panels/index.ts.

dod.criterion: HudTab type uses 'status' not 'ops'
Tab label shows 'Status'
All 22 rename items updated
No TypeScript errors

tasks.title: Build StatusPanel.tsx with 4 sections
tasks.user_scenario: CEO opens the Status tab and sees a system overview: vitals at top, active directives with progress, recent completions velocity, and session health distribution.
tasks.scope: Create StatusPanel.tsx (replacing OpsPanel.tsx) with: (1) VitalsStrip — 2x2 KPI grid showing connection status, active sessions count, active directives count, in-flight projects count. (2) ActiveDirectives — list of activeDirectives[] with pipeline step name, weight badge, project count, progress bar from pipelineSteps completion. (3) Velocity — last 5 completed directives from directiveHistory with relative timestamps, plus 7d throughput count. (4) SessionHealth — horizontal stacked bar showing session status distribution (working=green, idle=gray, error=red, waiting=yellow) with counts. Use panelUtils primitives (SectionHeader, PixelProgress, ParchmentDivider, PIXEL_CARD, PARCHMENT). Delete OpsPanel.tsx after.

dod.criterion: System Vitals KPI strip renders with 4 metrics
Active Directives shows pipeline progress per directive
Velocity shows last 5 completed + 7d count
Session Health shows stacked bar with status distribution
No references to FeatureRecord/BacklogRecord/workState.features/backlogs
Parchment theme styling consistent with other panels
No TypeScript errors
